programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E625 - The Olden Days
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young but are pleased to see that they've always been best friends.

programme.title: E113 - The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E104 - Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E515 - Pups And The Mystery Of The Driverless Snocat
programme.desc: Daring Danny's new remote control accidentally takes control of Everest's SnoCat and all the vehicles in Adventure Bay!

programme.title: E122 - Barbabright Has A Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: E417 - Pups Save A Space Rock / Pups Save A Good Mayor
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. // Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

On Tram Tracks Through WrocŁAw - A City In Transition
programme.desc: The best way to appreciate Wrocław is from tram line No. 1. It has been rolling through the city for 140 years - passing rubble, after the war, and past renovated facades, modern apartment blocks and the grassy banks of the River Oder, today.

programme.title: Old But Bold - How An 81-Year-Old Sprinter Chases A World Record
programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

programme.title: On Tram Tracks Through WrocŁAw - A City In Transition
programme.desc: The best way to appreciate Wrocław is from tram line No. 1. It has been rolling through the city for 140 years - passing rubble, after the war, and past renovated facades, modern apartment blocks and the grassy banks of the River Oder, today.

programme.title: The Sushi Hype - Lifestyle Trend With A Dark Side
programme.desc: Sushi: Once an expensive gourmet food, now a global fast-food phenomenon. Whether you get it from an Asian snack bar or a supermarket to-go box, sushi is trendy. It's low in calories, healthy, and affordable. But sushi consumption also brings problems.

programme.title: Why Losing Weight Is So Difficult - And What Really Helps

E4 - Freshwater: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Freshwater is often the stage on which millions of animals gather to find a mate. And the cycle of freshwater is the trigger for spectacular mating rituals and fierce competition.

programme.desc: Lamput is stuck in the lab with a dangerous robot on the loose! It’s up to the combined effort of the two Docs and the entire Lab team to save him before it is too late.

programme.title: E98 - Steven Vs. Amethyst/It Could Have Been Great
programme.desc: Steven and Amethyst get competitive while training with Pearl.

programme.title: E10 - Prank Callers/Benson Be Gone/Bad Kiss/Limousine Lunchtime/I Like You Hi
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: The Water Cycle
programme.desc: Overheated, Kit loses consciousness and embarks on a strange dream journey around the world.

programme.title: Tricky Pictures
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts think they are on the trail of a giant bird until they realise it is a visual illusion.

programme.title: Electric Current and Power
programme.desc: How do batteries work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of electricity. Have hands-on fun by making a battery using lemons, and get to know Nikola Tesla, physicist, engineer and inventor, who conceived the modern alternating current supply system.

programme.title: All Gamers Day
programme.desc: The Gaming Show gang decide to create their own video game-themed holiday called All Gamers Day.

programme.title: Tricky Pictures
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts think they are on the trail of a giant bird until they realise it is a visual illusion.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Fairy Frog
programme.desc: Addison's and Tess's fairy garden school project attracts a mysterious glowing frog, and while Alex thinks it's radioactive and Tess believes it's a magical fairy frog, Addison is determined to find the real answer to this amphibious mystery.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: Cassette
programme.desc: Oo we have found some old gems, let's create something cool and funky out of them.

programme.title: What's that smell?
programme.desc: When the kids discover that Yoko is the cause of an awful smell, they have to convince him to take his very first bath!

programme.title: The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Trip to Alaska
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are making ice cream when Alim arrives with a smoked herring, ready to add it in. The kids protest-fish in ice cream? Alim challenges them and takes them to Alaska, where Jamie shows them that traditional ice cream there is made with seal fat and fish!

programme.title: Trip to Czech Republic
programme.desc: Alim is puzzled by Milo and his sister sharing the same last name and takes them to the Czech Republic. In Chrudim, they meet Vaclav and two puppets. Zoe and Milo offer to deliver the puppets to the museum but, due to a last name mix-up, end up on a wild adventure.

programme.title: A Fright to Behold

programme.title: Crusty Bogies!
programme.desc: How are bogies made? With the help of a supersized nose, the doctors make their own! We follow Dr Ronx on a busy hospital shift and Gladiator Dynamite kicks off a foot Body Battle!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Kaiko and Will try to examine a glowing fish but fall under its spell. Ant and Fontaine must rescue their parents, wearing blindfolds.

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: An Oldie but a Gooey

programme.title: What Makes Bread Rise?
programme.desc: Bread rises thanks to a chemical reaction called fermentation and yeast, which converts sugars in the dough into carbon dioxide and ethanol. The carbon dioxide created is trapped in the elastic gluten network causing the dough to rise and expand.

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: C'est en France
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur l'actualité en France : société, politique et culture. À travers des reportages et des interviews, nous explorons les enjeux du quotidien pour mieux comprendre la réalité vécue par les Français aujourd'hui.

programme.title: E111 - Where There's a Will, There's a Way / Lost in the Sauce
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack & Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

programme.title: E213 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 2
programme.desc: When B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet that grants him superhero powers, the Thundermans unite to stop his plan. Chloe must reveal her identity to save her friends.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E622 - Pop Pop the Question / Lynn and Order
programme.desc: When the kids discover Myrtle has a shady past, they try to expose her before Pop Pop proposes. // Lynn and Liam butt heads when they're forced to partner up as the middle school hall monitors.

programme.title: E213 - How Zelda Got Her Groove Back Back
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are determined to find Principal Willingham a date so she'll approve a school dance, but disagree on who her date should be. Separately, they set out on their own match-making missions to prove who is right.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E102 - Stair Wars / Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict. // The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: E111 - Mixed Up
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E47 - Go Jet Academy: Symbiosis Shrink Down
programme.desc: The Go Jetters learn about 'symbiosis' - when two different animals or plants help each other.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E10 - Andy And The Giraffe
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Namibian desert in Southern Africa and meets a giraffe.

programme.title: E41 - The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: E2 - Fatberg, London Sewers, England
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: E2 - Hat Fuss
programme.desc: Scarf Lady needs some inspiration so Sarah takes her to the Hat Museum.

programme.title: E3 - Bubbles
programme.desc: Stanley cleans Cynthia's bus, but each time he does it keeps getting dirty again. It's so dirty by the end, he invents a super-duper cleaning machine that makes a sea of bubbles.

programme.title: E2 - House
programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.desc: The Squirrels get an interactive history lesson from Duggee and a host of famous faces.

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E8 - Mysteries Of The Great Pyramid
programme.desc: With exclusive access to one of the Seven Wonders of the World, Josh unravels conspiracy theories about the pyramid and scans for secret passages.

programme.title: E3 - Matt's National Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Matt chases a rare copy of the Declaration of Independence in a jam-packed hoard and digs through a 4,000-square-foot chicken coop for vintage motorcycles.

programme.title: E14 - Breaking Mandy
programme.desc: As the wintery Opilio season roars on, Sig puts Mandy at the helm in boat-crushing seas.

programme.title: E6 - Shake, Rattle And Gold
programme.desc: A BC miner fights to set up a legacy mine for his son, located beside the gold-rich Fraser River.

programme.title: E5 - Boiling Point
programme.desc: Tensions explode on the Tomcod Claim! Chris takes radical action against a dredge he believes is jumping his claim.

programme.title: E8 - Mysteries Of The Great Pyramid
programme.desc: With exclusive access to one of the Seven Wonders of the World, Josh unravels conspiracy theories about the pyramid and scans for secret passages.

programme.title: E11 - Prop, Drop & Ball
programme.desc: Join the unconventional Tweto family as they continue to transport life's necessities to one of the most remote and extreme regions of America.

programme.title: E2 - Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five is living out their ultimate homesteading dream and building a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: E12 - New Wings Over Alaska
programme.desc: Join the unconventional Tweto family as they continue to transport life's necessities to one of the most remote and extreme regions of America.

programme.title: E3 - Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect plans to build a one-of-a-kind modern cabin deep in the California Redwoods that will rival the jaw-dropping views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: E4 - The Boys Do Car Vs Bike
programme.desc: Zack and Ari want to see what's faster, a car or a motorcycle. They test the two vehicles on a track to see which comes out ahead.

programme.title: E6 - Best Of'
programme.desc: A collection of the best moments from across the series. What were Turbo Pickers Paul Cowland's and Dave Southall's premier auto picks?

programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: E3 - And The Court Had A Clerk...
programme.desc: Liz represents a bicycle shop in a libel case. Marissa receives an interesting offer. A questionable client comes to the firm, asking for Carmen to represent him.

programme.title: E4 - And The Clerk Had A Firm...
programme.desc: Carmen gets a tip from a client with regard to Diane and Kurt. Marissa finds that Judge Wackner has an investor. The firm is requested to run a sensitivity read on a stand-up comic's materials.

programme.desc: A family of victims from a house fire are rushed to Gaffney.

programme.title: E5 - And The Firm Had Two Partners...
programme.desc: Carmen and Liz represent Rivi suing a hospital who according to him discriminated black and brown COVID patients, which led to his daughter's death. Diane tries to get Kurt to name his shooting range friends, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Librarian: The Return To King Solomon's Mines
programme.desc: Adventurer Flynn Carsen receives a secret map to King Solomon's Mines. When the map is stolen, Flynn sets out to find the map and the Key of Solomon's book, without which the map is useless anyway.

programme.title: E3 - The Boil Over
programme.desc: Capt. Jason introduces anonymous guest feedback cards and the crew celebrates a record-breaking tip.

programme.title: E6 - Western Australia: More Than Meets The Eye
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E2 - Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: E1 - Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: E2 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: E2

programme.title: E1 - Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: E2 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

E34
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: Iceman Cometh
programme.desc: Yuen Biao and Yuen Wah are two Ming Dynasty adversaries who topple into an ice chasm, only to be thawed out in modern day Hong Kong.

programme.title: Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part2)
programme.desc: Since veteran filmmaker Manfred Wong joined the film industry since 1970s and worked for numerous Hong Kong companies at the position from scriptwriter, Head of Promotions to film producer, he has now been the best guide bringing us to travel through a sense of nostalgia for the old days of Hong Kong cinema. In this programme, he tells refinedly that there was a strife between Cantonese and Mandarin movies in 50s and 60s while fierce competitions amongst different film production companies over decades; also how various film companies manifested in the 90s golden era of Hong Kong movies.

programme.title: Ne Zha
programme.desc: The aura from heaven and earth has given birth to a powerful pearl inserted with huge energy. Yuanshi Tianzun (the Primeval Lord of Heaven) concocts two pills out of the pearl – a spiritual pill (Ling Zhu) and a sorcery pill (Mo Wan). He then seals both of them in the seven-colored sacred lotus. The spiritual pill will reincarnate as a man, who is destined to assist in the creation of the new Zhou dynasty; whilst a demon will be born of the sorcery pill, who is set to bring great destructions to the world. To prevent disasters, Yuanshi Tianzun has initiated a kalpa spell to strike the sorcery pill with thunder in three years. Facing the advent of the thunder, will Nezha still be the demon as destined? What will he choose?

programme.title: Hi-Five
programme.desc: The five ordinary people, who developed their superpowers after receiving organ transplants from a previously superpowered being, fighting against another psychic, who also gained the power through transplant and covets their powers.

programme.title: I Love Hong Kong 2013
programme.desc: Hong Kong of the 1970s - a place bustling with opportunities and riches! The earnest Sung befriended the crafty Ha and the latter also helped Song found his first job: a waiter at a Chinese Teahouse. The boss of the Teahouse is a kind man, who has an array of quirky characters as his staff. The colorful characters attracted an interesting patronage, making it a happening place for the community. Fate has it that both Sung and Ha fell for the same girl: May who is from a well-to-do family. It's face off between the geek and the smooth-talker. While romance is blossoming between May and Song, May's best friend Yuen is a gutsy girl who insisted that bad boys are attractive and only have eyes for Ha. Decades past and Sung weathered many changing times: crash of stock market; era of mass-migration and more... While Sung remained steadfast, guarding the teahouse, continuing to serve his loyal patrons and providing jobs for his long-serving staff, the fast-thinking Ha now owns a bu

programme.title: Into The Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites
programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: E2 - Strength in Sisterhood
programme.desc: The Hollywood pride reels after the Nomad’s brutal attack on their leader, Ava, leaves her desperately weak and unable to hunt. To add to her woes, her hungry pride start rejecting her. But without her, they struggle to bring down prey.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E326
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E3 - 開業儀式正式啟動
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E8 - 塞外東巡 (上)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy & happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ & his friends learn the importance of washing their hands & how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty & TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup & learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

E9
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E1 - The Pilot
programme.desc: As four misfit kids vow to find their missing classmate, Major Leroy Hanlon arrives to a mixed reception at Derry Air Force Base.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: The story follows an American family who visit a British family they met on holiday.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]

What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.desc: Hooker's life is on the line when he falls in love with a beautiful journalist whose expose of problems in the intelligence division has angered his fellow police officers.

programme.title: E15 - Someone To Watch Over Me, Part I
programme.desc: ALF insists on helping the Tanners with their involvement in the neighborhood watch. After he joins the block patrol, ALF cried sheep so many times that no one believes him when he spots a burglar .

programme.title: E15 - The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: After Peggy gives the highway salute to a rude driver while in the Rhoades' car, Steve is obsessed with the fear that the enraged driver -- a possible ex-con -- may come looking for him.

programme.title: E6 - Walk A Straight Line
programme.desc: Hooker's life is jeopardized when an alcoholic cop blunders his way into a stakeout to take revenge on a drugged-out robber who wounded his partner.

programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.desc: David accepts a ride from a psychotic man who offers to take him to Florida in his private plane.

programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world.
